acceptance_targets: [ch07-award-01] PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:151, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:153, Owen's shift in priority is named once and at least one of the other cited beats preserves concrete human counterpressure instead of restating the same thesis; FAIL if two or more of those cited beats still paraphrase 'the school war is smaller now.'

[ch07-craft-01] PASS if, in the chamber sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:81, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:91, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:123, Tallow materially alters Owen's inspection at least twice and the exit is triggered by a concrete obstacle or worsening cost already in play; FAIL if Tallow still mainly observes while Owen explains the room uninterrupted.

[ch07-prose-01] PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:99, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:113, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:115, no more than two negation-led reclassification sentences remain and at least three interpretive turns arrive through positive concrete description or bodily response; FAIL if the cited reveal beats still rely mainly on 'not X / only Y' phrasing.

[FA-005] Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2199-2204 retains one singular, precise teeth-pressure image and does not stack extra mouth/jaw/teeth phrasing nearby. Fail if this chapter introduces duplicate versions of the same cue in the same local span.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:151, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:153, Owen's shift in priority is named once and at least one of the other cited beats preserves concrete human counterpressure instead of restating the same thesis; FAIL if two or more of those cited beats still paraphrase 'the school war is smaller now.'
findings.problem: The chapter states Owen's new scale of concern too many times and too cleanly, so the moral disturbance arrives as an announced thesis instead of a destabilizing shift. The revelation is clear, but shortlist-level force would leave more friction between the planetary problem and the still-human cruelty above him.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:151, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:153, keep one explicit articulation of Owen's reprioritization and convert the other beats into resisting evidence: Tallow's visible cost, Martha's remembered injury, or the castle's ordinary violence should stay active enough to trouble the new perspective rather than paraphrase it.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, in the chamber sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:81, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:91, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:123, Tallow materially alters Owen's inspection at least twice and the exit is triggered by a concrete obstacle or worsening cost already in play; FAIL if Tallow still mainly observes while Owen explains the room uninterrupted.
findings.problem: Once the undercroft opens, Tallow's taboo and bodily cost stop structuring the scene. He becomes an occasional pressure gauge while Owen translates apparatus for the reader, which makes the chamber read more like a briefing than a live ordeal shared with the one witness who has something to lose here.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:81, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:91, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:123, keep Tallow active inside the chamber: let him forbid a touch, force Owen to choose what to inspect first, supply maintenance knowledge Owen lacks, or press the retreat before Owen has fully translated the room. The revelation should be earned under escalating cost, not delivered in a mostly uninterrupted interpretive run.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:99, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:113, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:115, no more than two negation-led reclassification sentences remain and at least three interpretive turns arrive through positive concrete description or bodily response; FAIL if the cited reveal beats still rely mainly on 'not X / only Y' phrasing.
findings.problem: The chapter overuses negation-led reclassification as its default sentence machine: 'it was not X,' 'there was no X,' 'not just Y.' That pattern appears often enough that the revelation starts sounding mechanically self-correcting instead of freshly perceived.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the repeated negation-driven turns at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:75, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:85, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:99, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:113, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:115 so the room and table are defined more often through positive material detail, action, or bodily effect. Keep one or two strategic contrast sentences, but stop using the same not-X/only-Y construction as the dominant way Owen learns.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2199-2204 retains one singular, precise teeth-pressure image and does not stack extra mouth/jaw/teeth phrasing nearby. Fail if this chapter introduces duplicate versions of the same cue in the same local span.
findings.problem: Recurring somatic-vocabulary pattern: old-work strain defaults to teeth/molars/jaw sensation in 7 chapters across the novel, and this chapter contains the first strong instance at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2203. This is the strongest early version and should be the one this chapter KEEPS while later chapters vary the register.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the teeth-pressure cue at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2199-2204, but make sure this chapter does not add any second nearby teeth/jaw variant. If you revise the span, sharpen why this is the foundational bodily signature of undercroft pressure rather than another interchangeable stress marker.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
